Our story

From market stall
to neighbourhood table

What started as a stall at the Revelstoke Farmers Market has grown into Mackenzie Village's favourite morning stop. We bake everything from scratch — cinnamon buns, pretzels, sourdough — and pair it with locally roasted coffee, hearty breakfast sandwiches and made-to-order lunch, all inside a warm, welcoming neighbourhood space.

Fresh baked, daily
Locally roasted coffee
Mackenzie Village

Fresh off the grill

What's on the board

Breakfast, lunch, and everything hot off the grill — baked fresh and served all day.

Straight off our chalkboard, item for item.

Breakfast Sando

Baked egg, cheese, tomato, red pepper & greens on a bagel or pretzel bun.

Choice of bagel or pretzel bun

Yoghurt Bowl

Fresh fruit, housemade granola, honey & your choice of yoghurt.

Greek or coconut
$12

Pretzel Sandwich

Our house-baked pretzel bun, stuffed and griddled to order.

$12

G.F. Sandwich

Gluten-free option of our classic breakfast sandwich.

$15

English Muffin

Fried egg, Swiss cheese & caramelized onions. Add chorizo patty +$2.50, home fries +$2.

B.L.T. Bagel

Bacon, lettuce & tomato. Add fried egg +$2.50, cheese or home fries +$2.

$12.50

T.L.T. Bagel

Marinated tofu, lettuce & tomato. Add fried egg +$2.50, cheese or home fries +$2.

Vegan option available
$12.50

Panini

Freshly baked focaccia, real local mozzarella & housemade spread with spicy salami, black forest ham or tofu.

Vegan option — ask in store
$15

Soup of the Day

Made fresh daily, served with a thick slice of our own bread. Ask what's simmering today.

★★★★★

"Stopped in while passing through Revelstoke — even after most of the breakfast items had sold out by mid-morning, the tofu panini didn't disappoint. Easy to see why locals love it here."

P
itsjustpips

★★★★★

"Smooth coffee and seriously good-looking baked goods — the cinnamon rolls, sandwiches and quiche all looked amazing. A perfect stop on the way to the mountain."

E
Elle Dominique

"A true neighbourhood gem — excellent baked treats, well-made coffee, and consistently lovely, personable service from everyone on staff."
